experimental_design: comparison of cohorts based on prior treatment exposure
To comprehensively evaluate how prior cetuximab exposure affects immunotherapy outcomes, we analyzed two independent cohorts of HNSCC patients.
factor_value: patients who were cetuximab naive showed significantly longer overall survival (OS) under ICB treatment compared to those with prior cetuximab exposure.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: Multiplex immunofluorescence analysis does not specify technical replicates.
